name: Chiligetti
recipeIngredient: 1 16 oz. can tomatoes, undrained, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir ground beef and onions in a large skillet until the meat is brown and onions are tender.
2. Stir in tomatoes, tomato sauce, chili powder, salt, and beans with liquid.
3. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
4. Cook uncovered about 10 minutes or until of desired consistency.
5. Cook spaghetti as directed on package. Drain.
6. Turn spaghetti onto a large platter and top with hot chili mixture.
